title: Extend 007 loading animation duration on initial page load

requirements.text: Increase the duration of the Bond-style gun barrel (007) loading animation shown on the InitialLoadingScreen so that it remains visible for a noticeably longer period when the page first loads.

quotes: when the page first loads can the load of the 007 last longer

acceptanceCriteria: The gun barrel / 007 animation on InitialLoadingScreen plays for a longer duration before transitioning to the game.
The extended animation feels intentional and cinematic rather than a freeze or hang.
The rest of the loading sequence (progress bar, stage labels) still completes normally after the animation.

constraints: Do not alter files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not change any backend logic or data models.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or style of the loading animation.
Adding new animation keyframes or assets.
